LAW AND MOTION, 302, NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON THAT AWARD, SUBMITTED ON FEB-20-2018 BY HAROLD E. KAHN. PETITIONER GIAMPAOLO BOSCHETTI'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR THE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON THAT AWARD - THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED EXCEPT AS TO THE ISSUE OF ATTORNEY FEES AWARDED TO MR. BOSCHETTI, WHICH THE COURT WILL TAKE UNDER SUBMISSION ON FEBRUARY 20, 2018. [SEE THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING.] THE PARTIES MAY FILE ADDITIONAL BRIEFS AND SUBMIT COMPETING PROPOSED ORDERS AND PROPOSED JUDGMENTS NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 20, 2018. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR THE COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT ADAM SPARKS' PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD - RESPONDENT ADAM SPARKS' PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED IN PART FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE RULING ON MR. BOSCHETTI'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For The Entry Of Judgment On That Award
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Leo M. Larocca, Esq. of the Niven & Smith LLP, T:415.981.5451, for petitioner/moving party;
Jeffrey T. Makoff, Esq. of Valle Makoff LLP, T:415.986.8001, for respondent/opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows:

PETITIONER GIAMPAOLO BOSCHETTI's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For The Entry Of Judgment On That Award - The tentative ruling is adopted except as to the issue of attorney fees awarded to Mr. Boschetti, which the Court will take under submission on February 20, 2018. [See the court's tentative ruling.] The parties may file additional briefs and submit competing proposed orders and proposed judgments no later than February 20, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Petitioner Giampaolo Boschetti'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For The Entry Of Judgment On That Award. (Added To Calendar For Entry Of Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Petitioner Giampaolo Boschetti'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For The Entry Of Judgment On That Award (Added To Calendar For Entry Of Tentative Ruling Only) is duplicate entry. [302]

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey T. Makoff, Esq. of Valle Makoff LLP, T:415.986.8001, for respondent/moving party;
Leo M. Larocca, Esq. of the Niven & Smith LLP, T:415.981.5451, for petitioner/opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows:

RESPONDENT ADAM SPARKS' Petition To Vacate Arbitration Award - Respondent Adam Sparks' petition to vacate arbitration award is granted in part for the reasons stated in the ruling on Mr. Boschetti's petition to confirm arbitration award. The Court will take the issue of attorney fees awarded to Mr. Boschetti under submission on February 20, 2018. The parties may file additional briefs and submit competing proposed orders and proposed judgments no later than February 20, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For The Entry Of Judgment On That Award
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Continued To Feb-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
